description: Unique identifier for each line item (format ITMXXXXXX)
Foreign key linking to project_id in boq_projects.csv
High-level work category: Civil / Electrical / Plumbing
Description of the specific material or work item
Quantity of the item required for the project (in the specified unit)
Rate per unit in Indian Rupees (varies by city cost index; contains ~1.5% missing values by design)
Total amount for this line item in INR = quantity x rate_per_unit_inr (contains ~1.5% missing values by design)
